scores.correctness_notes: The agent answers the question with Python API code and correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer, but the gold standard focuses on the data schema (application-data and unit-data fields) and notes that charmlibs docs cover interface specs not Python API. The agent conflates what the charmlibs docs provide vs. what's in the traefik-k8s repo.
scores.hallucination_notes: The specific event class names IngressPerAppReadyEvent and IngressPerAppRevokedEvent are not verified by the gold standard — the library may use different names. The gold standard only mentions IngressPerAppRequirer as an example class name, not these event types. The v2 fetch command is presented confidently but gold standard recommends v1. Minor risk of fabricated Python API details beyond what charmlibs docs actually document.
